description: You are a multimodal transportation planner at SRM (Servizio Ferroviario Metropolitano) Bologna, tasked with evaluating transit accessibility along the Acosta corridor using the scenario located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/. Analyze bus transit performance and identify service gaps by generating and processing simulation data, including per-stop dwell times and passenger data saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/stop_output.xml. Compute modal performance metrics (average travel time, speed, time loss, and vehicle count) for buses and private cars, exporting the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/modal_performance.csv. Perform a bus stop analysis calculating the number of buses served, total dwell time, and average headway for each stop, saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/bus_stop_analysis.csv. Identify underserved stops—defined as those with fewer than 3 visits or an average headway exceeding 1200 seconds—and document them in /home/ga/SUMO_Output/underserved_stops.csv. Propose a service improvement by creating a new bus route file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_new_bus_route.rou.xml that serves at least 3 underserved stops with at least 2 new vehicles, and configure a modified simulation at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run_improved_transit.sumocfg. Document the complete transit accessibility assessment, including modal split analysis, stop utilization, identified gaps, and proposed impacts, in a report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/transit_assessment_report.txt.
